creator: bahlgren@beah.se
text:
(In reply to Kevin Bowling from comment #0)

I tested 375.26 vith a GeForce GTX 550 Ti on 10.3-R. Seems to work well so far.

Still has the blocky text console issue together with vt, like previous versions, so proper vt integration seems still lacking.  Kevin, did you try with 11.0?

Suspend/resume seems to work with both sc and vt, provided that Xorg first is started. With vt there is the glitch that Xorg vty isn't repainted properly, requiring a switch to a text console and back. If Xorg isn't started suspend/resume does not turn the monitor back on for the text consoles - it is completely black. Then starting Xorg results in a working graphics console, but text consoles are still black. (Note: this is a desktop system!)

NB: there is no regression compared to previous version in ports, as far as I can see.

Nit: I guess that PORTREVISION should be reset to 0?
